title: Fix full router with weak CSP and missing CSRF
prompt: `test_fixtures/router_weak_headers.ex` has three issues: (1) CSP includes `'unsafe-inline'` and `'unsafe-eval'`, (2) `strict-transport-security: max-age=0` defeats HSTS, (3) the `:api` pipeline omits `:protect_from_forgery` while sharing cookies with `:browser`, and (4) an `/unsubscribe` GET route does state-changing work. Rewrite the router so: (a) CSP is `default-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'`, (b) HSTS max-age is 31536000 (1 year) with `includeSubDomains`, (c) the `:api` pipeline includes `:protect_from_forgery`, (d) `/unsubscribe` is a POST. Write the fix to `lib/my_app_web/router.ex`.
tier_rationale: Multi-issue router hardening. Each fix is mechanical but requires catching all four.
